description: carrera has been in the watch industry for more than five decades and they have proven themselves as masters in the art of creating high quality timepieces. The new range of carrera watches are a fresh take on their classic driver and racer watch models and perfect for urban wear.Case diameter: 40 mmDial shape: RectangleStainless steel case in copper gold colourRubber straps with a tang clasp with brand inscriptionBlack dial with branding on the 3 hour markThree sub dialsMetallic handsWater resistant at 100 meters
